description: Universal champion optimized for ALL player counts (2P, 4P, 6P). Found via multi-player-count evolution + cross-evaluation grid search across 16 candidate configs at 5000 games each.

evaluation.methodology: Cross-player-count evaluation against all 9 lvl8 bot profiles at 2P, 4P, and 6P. 5000 games per matchup, run twice for stability.
evaluation.improvement: ~10x higher composite edge vs previous default. Beats 9/9 profiles at 4P and 6P while maintaining 2P parity.

trainingDetails.phase1: Parallel evolution at 2P, 4P, 6P (100 gen, pop 40, 80 games/matchup each)
trainingDetails.phase2: Cross-player-count evaluation grid search across 16 hand-crafted candidates (V1-V16)
trainingDetails.phase3: High-confidence validation at 5000 games per matchup, 2 independent runs
trainingDetails.keyInsight: Moderate bluffing (0.70) with high aggression (0.80) dominates multi-player without sacrificing 2P performance. Previous default (bluffFreq=0.00) was optimized for 2P only and actually LOST edge at 4P and 6P.
